description: Promotional content showcasing multiple complementary products or services packaged together at a discounted combined price to increase average transaction value.
structural_recipe: Create a carousel or single-image post displaying 3-5 complementary items grouped visually with bundled pricing highlighted. Use clear Arabic + English copy emphasizing savings percentage. Include a prominent CTA button linking to menu/ordering platform. Show product images in grid layout with price comparison (original vs bundle price). Use warm, appetizing photography with lifestyle context.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers value perceived savings and convenience in F&B purchases. Bundle offers create urgency through limited-time perception, reduce decision fatigue by pre-curating combinations, and increase perceived value. Family-oriented culture makes multi-item bundles feel practical and shareable.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure bundle pricing clearly shows savings in both SAR and percentage to build trust
Verify bundle combinations align with local taste preferences and dietary practices
Avoid bundling items that conflict with halal or religious dietary requirements
